mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_reaction (user_id, post_id, reaction_type, axis, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, #{reactionType}, #{axis}, #{anonymous}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reaction_type = VALUES(reaction_type), is_anonymous = VALUES(is_anonymous), created_at = NOW(), deleted_at = NULL
mapper.select: SELECT pr.*, pr.is_anonymous AS anonymous, u.name AS userName, u.status AS userStatus FROM post_reaction pr JOIN users u ON u.id = pr.user_id WHERE pr.post_id = #{postId} AND pr.deleted_at IS NULL AND (pr.is_anonymous = 0 OR pr.user_id = #{viewerId} ) ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE post_reaction pr JOIN user_privacy_policy upp ON upp.user_id = pr.user_id SET pr.deleted_at = COALESCE(pr.deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE pr.post_id = #{postId} AND pr.deleted_at IS NULL AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(upp.policy_json, CONCAT('$.reactionRetention.', LOWER(pr.reaction_type)))) = 'release'

UPDATE community_post cp SET cp.like_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'LIKE' AND deleted_at IS NULL), cp.dislike_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'DISLIKE' AND deleted_at IS NULL), cp.recommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'RECOMMEND' AND deleted_at IS NULL), cp.disrecommend_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'DISRECOMMEND' AND deleted_at IS NULL), cp.bookmark_count = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_reaction WHERE post_id = cp.id AND reaction_type = 'BOOKMARK' AND deleted_at IS NULL) WHERE cp.id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT cr.*, cr.is_anonymous AS anonymous, cc.post_id AS postId FROM comment_reaction cr JOIN community_comment cc ON cc.id = cr.comment_id WHERE cr.user_id = #{userId} AND cc.post_id = #{postId} AND cr.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_reaction (user_id, comment_id, reaction_type, axis, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{commentId}, #{reactionType}, #{axis}, #{anonymous}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reaction_type = VALUES(reaction_type), is_anonymous = VALUES(is_anonymous), created_at = NOW(), deleted_at = NULL
